rules.description: Source process integrity level is lower than target process integrity level.
Source and target processes are in different sessions.
Source and target processes are running under different user SIDs.
A service process in Session 0 attempts to interact with a user desktop process.
The input browser PID is a child process instead of the browser main process.
The target process does not have a visible top-level window.
A medium or limited process is associated with administrator-only operations.
The process priority class is lower than normal.
An AppCompat compatibility layer is configured for the target executable.
Source and target processes are associated with different desktops.
The target process is running inside an AppContainer.
The source process has no UIAccess while its integrity level is lower than the target process.
